description: claudemux Stop hook. On every Stop event, writes the assistant's last-turn text to /tmp/claude-idle/<session_id>.last and then touches /tmp/claude-idle/<session_id> as the wait-idle signal. The .last file lets the dispatcher pull a full reply without scraping tmux scrollback. The hook fires for every Claude Code session including the dispatcher itself; nothing waits on the dispatcher's own files, so the extra writes are harmless. See on-stop.sh for the implementation.
